headline: Could Elon Musk Lead 'DOGE' If Donald Trump Returns To The White House?
summary: Former President Donald Trump has expressed his intention to appoint Elon Musk to lead a new agency dedicated to enhancing government efficiency if he wins the November election.

headline: Tesla's Ambitious FSD Roadmap, Nio Accelerates With Strong Guidance, Faraday Future Gets Lifeline And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The EV industry's struggles have forced companies to either trim goals or look elsewhere for offsetting impact.

headline: Will Bezos Buy The Celtics Or Not? Latest Reports Say That He Will
summary: Jeff Bezos may actually buy the Boston Celtics, contradicting earlier news that he had 'no plans' to buy the reigning NBA champions.

headline: Elon Musk Less Influential To Artificial Intelligence Than Scarlett Johansson, Time Magazine Says: Billionaire Brushes Off Exclusion – 'Magazines Do Not Establish Relevance, History Does'
summary: Elon Musk missing out on honors from Time Magazine has some people lashing out. The billionaire took the high road by saying future results could show they're wrong.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Amazon – And Musk Responds To Idea Of Using Dogecoin For Starlink Payments In Brazil
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Apple Launched iPod Nano 19 Years Ago: If You Invested $1000 In Apple Stock When Steve Jobs Revealed His Vision For Music, Here's How Much You'd Have
summary: On Sept. 7, 2005, Steve Jobs unveiled the iPod Nano, revolutionizing the music industry and propelling Apple's growth, and a $1,000 investment in Apple stock at the time would have yielded substantial returns by 2024.

headline: Did A Potential Stock Sale By Elon Musk Lead To Fall In Tesla Shares? Top Analyst Says It Could Instead Be Because Of Broader Selloff In AI Stocks
summary: The recent drop in Tesla stock is more likely linked to a broader sell-off in AI stocks, triggered by a guidance miss from Broadcom, rather than Elon Musk selling shares, according to Gary Black.

headline: In 2020 Elon Musk Predicted That 100% Cars Produced By 2040 Will Be Electric And Fully Autonomous. Now He Says '99% Is Probably Right'
summary: Elon Musk has revised his 2020 prediction, now forecasting that by 2040, around 99% of cars produced will be electric and fully autonomous, slightly adjusting his earlier 100% estimate.

headline: DOJ Probes Google's AI Strategy As It Looks To Snap Its Monopoly In Search
summary: The U.S. Justice Department is seeking insight into Google's AI strategy during the remedies phase of an antitrust trial to propose solutions addressing the company's dominance in the search market.
